title: schizeilema haastii
intro: Schizeilema haastii, also known as the New Zealand cord-fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. The medicinal properties of Schizeilema haastii are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Schizeilema haastii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal capsules, to harness its potential health benefits and medicinal properties.
